general.prompt: Which dinosaur-fearing actor bit the dust at 78, leaving us all to wonder if we need a bigger boat?
general.summary: Sam Neill, star of Jurassic Park, died suddenly in Australia at age 78.

general.prompt: Who just decided to hit the brakes on bombing Iran after Tehran gave the Gulf states a ring-a-ding?
general.summary: The US ended its latest round of airstrikes on Iran after Tehran struck Gulf states.

general.prompt: What country thought the first night of bombing was so fun it decided to do it again on July 12?
general.summary: The US launched a second night of strikes on Iran after a major air assault.

general.prompt: What race was stalled for three hours because the sky decided to throw a pool party?
options: NASCAR Cup Series race at Atlanta
A race to the Strait of Hormuz
general.summary: The NASCAR Cup Series race at Atlanta was delayed over three hours due to lightning and rain.

general.prompt: What dipped after the US and Iran started playing pong with airstrikes, making South Korea's Kospi take a 7% nosedive?
general.summary: Stock futures slipped after US and Iran exchanged airstrikes, with the Kospi plunging 7%.

tech.prompt: What explosive new title is blowing up the Super Bomberman Collection this August?
tech.summary: Konami will add Super Bomberman: Panic Bomber W to the Super Bomberman Collection via a free update on August 20.

tech.prompt: Which console will NOT get the Super Yanoman Collection?
tech.summary: Edia's Super Yanoman Collection will launch on PS5, PS4, Switch, and PC in Japan on December 10, priced at 8,580 yen.

tech.prompt: What color is the new Google Pixel 11 Pro Fold leak showing off?
tech.summary: A leaked render of the Pixel 11 Pro Fold shows it in Google's new 'Pine' colorway with a sleeker camera design.

tech.prompt: How much could it cost you to own a real T. rex fossil named Gus?
options: A lifetime supply of Poké Balls
tech.summary: The Tyrannosaurus rex fossil known as 'Gus' will be auctioned with an estimated price of up to $30 million.

tech.prompt: What milestone is Pokémon Go celebrating with millions still trying to catch 'em all?
tech.summary: Pokémon Go celebrates its 10th anniversary, with millions of players still active, according to Scopely's vice president.

business.prompt: SpaceX just went public! But a month later, has the excitement fizzled out like a rocket that forgot its fuel?
options: Yes, the excitement is fading as financial realities set in
The IPO made history, but oil prices jumped as US and Iran traded attacks
Excitement is now focused on their new line of 'Space Snacks'
No, Elon Musk promised free rides to Mars for all shareholders
business.summary: A month after its historic IPO, SpaceX's financial reality is becoming clearer, tempering initial hype.

business.prompt: Stock futures are slipping after US and Iran exchanged airstrikes. Did the Kospi index also get caught in the crossfire?
options: The Kospi plunge was caused by a shirtless man destroying a Waymo
No, the Kospi actually soared because investors love conflict
Kospi was down but recovered after Kim Jong Un moonwalked on the stock exchange
business.summary: US stock futures fell and South Korea's Kospi plunged 7% amid renewed US-Iran airstrikes and anticipation of earnings reports.

business.prompt: Oil prices jumped as the US and Iran clashed over the Strait of Hormuz. Is your wallet feeling lighter just reading this?
options: Oil prices jumped, similar to how Kospi plunged 7% earlier
Oil prices actually fell as Iran decided to export olive oil instead
No, oil prices dropped because everyone switched to electric cars overnight
business.summary: Brent crude oil prices rose over 4% due to escalating tensions between the US and Iran over the Strait of Hormuz.

business.prompt: A shirtless man vandalized a Waymo robotaxi in Hollywood. Is this the latest critique of autonomous driving?
options: The man was trying to teach the Waymo how to do the Macarena
This incident caused a Kospi-like plunge in Waymo's stock value
Yes, he was arrested for vandalism
No, he was actually giving the Waymo a friendly hug
business.summary: A shirtless man was arrested for vandalizing a Waymo driverless vehicle in a busy East Hollywood intersection.

business.prompt: The iconic Pea Soup Andersen's building is headed for demolition. Will we ever taste that creamy soup again?
options: The demolition is delayed as shirtless man protests on site
The building will be turned into a giant bowl of soup by the city
No, they're replacing it with a Pea Soup Andersen's theme park
Yes, but only at the remaining location in Santa Nella
business.summary: The historic Pea Soup Andersen's building in Santa Ynez Valley is set to be demolished, leaving only one location in Santa Nella.

sports.prompt: Which young basketball star is lighting up the NBA Summer League like a Christmas tree in July?
sports.summary: AJ Dybantsa impressed again in NBA Summer League action according to the Deseret News.

sports.prompt: What caused a 3-hour delay at the NASCAR Cup Series race in Atlanta?
options: A swarm of angry bees on turn 4
A meteor strike on pit road
A security breach by Jay-Z fans
sports.summary: The Quaker State 400 NASCAR Cup Series race on July 12 at EchoPark Speedway was delayed for more than three hours due to lightning and rain.

sports.prompt: What caused chaos and delayed the start of Jay-Z's final concert at Yankee Stadium?
options: A rogue hot dog vendor selling illegal toppings
A surprise appearance by Beyoncé's clone
sports.summary: A large group broke through security at Jay-Z's final concert, prompting a full lockdown of Yankee Stadium.

sports.prompt: Who reportedly acted alone in clearing USMNT's Folarin Balogun to face Belgium?
options: A rogue intern with a stamp
sports.summary: Per the Times of London, a FIFA official acted alone in clearing USMNT's Folarin Balogun to face Belgium, though important disciplinary decisions usually involve three committee members.

sports.prompt: Which soccer legend boldly declared 'We'll put Messi to bed' ahead of the World Cup semifinal?
options: A talking parrot named Sir Winston
sports.summary: Joe Cole, an English football legend, said they would put Messi to bed ahead of the World Cup semifinal between England and Argentina.

science.prompt: A 25-year-old is building India's spaceplane! What's their plan for it?
options: Build a space station out of dinosaur fossils
Fly it to Mars and back on a single tank of fuel
Use it to deliver pizza to astronauts on the ISS
Supply modules to the Bharatiya Antariksh Station
science.summary: A 25-year-old aims to create a vehicle that can supply modules to India's planned Bharatiya Antariksh Station and bring products back.

science.prompt: Want to own a real T. rex? It could cost you $30 million! What's the fossil's name?
science.summary: The Tyrannosaurus rex fossil known as 'Gus' will go up for auction.

science.prompt: A Chinese spacecraft is approaching a mysterious object near Earth! What's so special about it?
options: It's the smallest object humans have visited with a spacecraft
It's an asteroid full of RNA building blocks
science.summary: It's the 'smallest object that humans have visited with a spacecraft.'

science.prompt: Scientists found sugar in asteroid Bennu samples! What did they discover?
science.summary: Ribose and glucose were found in Bennu samples, with all chemical components needed to build RNA present.

science.prompt: A 6,000-year-old infant from Mesopotamia shows signs of what?
science.summary: A 6,000-year-old infant from Tell Brak shows the earliest known evidence of child abuse in the Middle East.
